200.description: Returns a single project with its devices

200.description: Returns a paginated list of API tokens (excluding the token value for security)

get.summary: List environment variable keys for a project

200.description: Returns list of env var keys (values are never returned)

put.summary: Set one or more environment variables for a project

400.description: Invalid key format or value too large

404.description: Project or env var not found

get.summary: List all devices in a project

get.summary: Get a single device by ID
Get live connection status for a device

426.description: Upgrade required - WebSocket upgrade header expected

200.description: Returns the device response to the command

504.description: Command timed out — no response from device

404.description: Project, device, or script not found
